stmt: ∀ {Γ Δ Λ : List Tp} {A B C : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ ++ Δ ++ Λ, isRightOnly x) → isRightOnly A → isRightOnly B → isRightOnly C → (Δ ⇒ A) → ((Γ ++ [B ⧸ A] ++ Δ ++ Λ ⇒ C) ↔ (Γ ++ [B] ++ Λ ⇒ C))
∀ {Γ Δ Λ : List Tp} {A B C : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ ++ Δ ++ Λ, isLeftOnly x) → isLeftOnly A → isLeftOnly B → isLeftOnly C → (Δ ⇒ A) → ((Γ ++ Δ ++ [A ⧹ B] ++ Λ ⇒ C) ↔ (Γ ++ [B] ++ Λ ⇒ C))
∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp}, residualAtomicState Γ A = none ↔ Γ = [] ∧ ¬ is_atom A
∀ {Γ Δ : List Tp} {A : Tp} {s : String}, residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) → (Γ ⇒ A ↔ Δ ⇒ # s)
∀ {Γ : List Tp} {s : String}, (¬ ∃ q : AtomicResidualState, AtomicResidualGraphStep (Γ, s) q) → ((Γ ⇒ # s) ↔ Γ = [# s])
∀ {Γ Δ : List Tp} {A B C : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ ++ Δ, isRightOnly x) → isRightOnly A → isRightOnly B → isRightOnly C → (Γ ⇒ B ⧸ A) → (Δ ⇒ C ⧸ B) → Δ ++ Γ ⇒ C ⧸ A
∀ {Γ Δ : List Tp} {A B C : Tp}, (∀ x ∈ Γ ++ Δ, isLeftOnly x) → isLeftOnly A → isLeftOnly B → isLeftOnly C → (Γ ⇒ A ⧹ B) → (Δ ⇒ B ⧹ C) → Γ ++ Δ ⇒ A ⧹ C
